name: ActionTypeArtifactDetails
description: Information about parameters for artifacts associated with the action type, such as the minimum and maximum artifacts allowed.

allOf.description: The minimum number of artifacts that can be used with the action type. For example, you should specify a minimum and maximum of zero input artifacts for an action type with a category of source.
The maximum number of artifacts that can be used with the actiontype. For example, you should specify a minimum and maximum of zero input artifacts for an action type with a category of source.
